description: Evaluates cryptographic key management maturity—service governance, policies, key inventory systems, CEK roles, provisioning and deprovisioning, secure storage, and key lifecycle operations including rotation, revocation, activation, suspension, deactivation, archival, compromise, recovery, and deprovisioning.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A cryptographic key management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise cryptographic key management service exists
Frequent cryptographic key management service efficacy review

capabilities.name: Encryption and Key Management Policy and Procedures
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide cryptographic procedures and policies are reviewed frequently for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Key Inventory management system
capabilities.description: A key management solution manages cryptographic keys with automation, configuration review, and integrations.
evaluation_focus: Key management solution for cryptographic keys
Automation support for all enterprise keys
Frequent key management solution configuration review
Integration with data management and certificate management

capabilities.name: CEK Roles and Responsibilities
capabilities.description: Clear roles and responsibilities exist for CEK management.
evaluation_focus: Clear CEK management roles and responsibilities

capabilities.name: Cryptographic key provisioning Policies
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide key provisioning policies and procedures are reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Cryptographic key De provisioning policies
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide key deprovisioning policies and procedures are reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Key Provisioning
capabilities.description: A formalized key provisioning process uses automation and is reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Key rotation
capabilities.description: A formalized key rotation process supports automatic rotation and frequent review.

capabilities.name: Key revocation
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide key revocation processes support automation and frequent review.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide key revocation process and procedures
Automated key revocation based on triggers

capabilities.name: Key activation
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide key activation processes support automation from change management and frequent review.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide key activation process and procedures
Automatic key activation from change management triggers

capabilities.name: Key suspension
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide key suspension processes respond to triggers like compromise and are reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide key suspension process and procedures
Key suspension based on compromise triggers

capabilities.name: Key deactivation
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide key deactivation policies support automation and frequent review.

capabilities.name: Key archival
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide key archival policies support automation and frequent review.

capabilities.name: Key compromise
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide key compromise policies remove or deprovision compromised keys and are reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Remove or deprovision keys when compromised

capabilities.name: Key Recovery
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide key recovery policies support automated recovery and frequent review.
evaluation_focus: Automated recovery for corrupt or compromised keys

capabilities.name: Key Deprovisioning
capabilities.description: A formalized key deprovisioning process uses automation and is reviewed frequently.

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
